title: Avoid Path Injection Attacks in I/O Function Calls
description: Prevent path injection attacks by validating user input before constructing file paths for I/O function calls.
recommendation: Validate user input before constructing file paths for I/O function calls.
impact: Allows an attacker to access, modify, or delete files that should be inaccessible.

checks.message: Validate user input before constructing file paths for I/O function calls.
